Revision date Tab Description
44835 APL Base Added eight indicator variables to account for new values for operating authority: OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1915AJ_IND, OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1932A_1915J_IND, OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1915BJ_IND, OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1115_1915J_IND, OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1915AK_IND, OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1932A_1915K_IND, OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1915BK_IND, and OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1115_1915K_IND.
